title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Upstox - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Upstox - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Upstox in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Upstox:
Upstox is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
